nodes.name: 🛡️ Loop Prevention (is_bot = false)
nodes.notes: CRITICAL: Stops infinite bot-to-bot message loops. Only passes messages where is_bot is FALSE (i.e. real humans).

nodes.name: 🔀 Smart Router (Text vs Photo)
nodes.notes: Routes message: TRUE branch → Photo/Vision Path. FALSE branch → Text/RAG Path.

nodes.name: 👁️ Nexus-Vision (Groq Llama 3.2-11B)
nodes.notes: Calls Groq Llama-3.2-11B Vision to perform OCR and structured extraction on uploaded photos.

nodes.name: 🔢 Cohere Embed (Vision Result)
nodes.notes: Generates 1024-dim embeddings from vision OCR output using Cohere Multilingual v3.0.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO documents (content, metadata, embedding)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('👁️ Nexus-Vision (Groq Llama 3.2-11B)').item.json.choices[0].message.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{"source": "nexus_vision", "type": "photo", "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}", "chat_id": "{{ $('📱 Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.chat.id }}"}'::jsonb,
  '[{{ $('🔢 Cohere Embed (Vision Result)').item.json.embeddings.float[0] }}]'::vector(1024)
)
RETURNING id;

nodes.name: 💾 Save Vision Memory (Supabase)
nodes.notes: Stores OCR text + 1024-dim vector embedding in Supabase pgvector documents table.

nodes.name: 📝 Text Router (Save vs Retrieve)
nodes.notes: TRUE: Message starts with 'Save:' → Manual memory ingestion. FALSE: Natural language query → AI Agent retrieval.

nodes.name: ✂️ Extract Save Content
nodes.notes: Strips the 'Save:' prefix and extracts clean content + metadata.

nodes.name: 🔢 Cohere Embed (Query)
nodes.notes: Embeds the user's query with input_type=search_query for asymmetric retrieval.

nodes.name: 🔍 Vector Search (match_documents)
nodes.notes: Calls match_documents() SQL function with 1024-dim vector. Returns top-5 semantically similar memories above 0.70 cosine similarity threshold.

nodes.name: 🧩 Prepare RAG Context
nodes.notes: Formats retrieved documents into a structured context string for the LLM prompt.

nodes.name: 🧠 Nexus-Brain (Groq Llama 3.3-70B)
nodes.notes: Groq Llama 3.3-70B generates the final RAG-grounded response. Single-turn = no iteration limit issues.

parameters.text: =Hey there! 🤖✨  Tum baat karo, main yaad rakhunga!  💾 Kuch store karna? → Bas bol do! 🔍 Kuch dhundna? → Bas pucho! 📸 Photo share karna? → Bhej do!  Main tumhara digital brain hun! 🧠⚡
=⏰ *Reminder Set!*  📝 *Task:* {{ $('Extract Reminder Details').item.json.reminder_text }} 🕐 *Time:* {{ $('Extract Reminder Details').item.json.remind_at }}  _I'll notify you on time!_ 🔔

⏰ When should I remind you to *{{ $json.reminder_text }}*?

Please reply with the full reminder like:
- remind me to {{ $json.reminder_text }} in 10 minutes
- remind me to {{ $json.reminder_text }} at 3pm

=🧠 *Nexus-AI Brain Export Complete!*

📊 *Export Summary:*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💾 Total Memories: *{{ $json.total_memories }}*
⏰ Total Reminders: *{{ $json.total_reminders }}*
📅 Export Date: {{ $now.toFormat('dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm') }}

📋 *JSON Data Below:*
(Copy and save as `{{ $json.file_name }}`)
